The '''MAS-2xB''' was a type of mobile [[blaster artillery]] and siege weapon manufactured by [[Loronar Defense Industries]]. The weapon was an immense, ovoid [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] platform developed for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] forces.

==Description==
===Appearance===
The MAS-2xB was ovoid in shape with its small command cabin beneath the rest of the vehicle. The mass of the weapon was so great that it relied on seven [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] drives. The vehicle also had slow acceleration and virtually no maneuverability. The MAS-2xB's maximum altitude was fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] and its top speed was forty-five [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]. The MAS-2xB was twice the size of an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] walker.<ref name="EGWT" />

The weapon required a crew of fifteen [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] to operate, including six [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] and [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] who maintained the [[Republic Engineering Corporation]] [[4.2FC fusion power core]] and repulsorlift drive systems since they vulnerable to frequent power surges and breakdowns. The MAS-2xB required sixteen [[Energy baffler|energy dampers]] to prevent power overloads and about half of these had to be replaced after seeing combat. MAS-2xBs also required special docking platforms to allow maintenance and repair.<ref name="EGWT" />

===Armament===
[[File:MAS-2xB_egwt.png|thumb|left|180px|MAS-2xB [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]
The MAS-2xB's main weapon was a mounted [[turbolaser pulsor]] capable of destroying the most advanced and sophisticated defense systems. These vehicles could also be deployed against military fortifications, troop bases, transportation centers, and even [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] at low altitudes. The MAS-2xB was powered by an immense [[Republic Engineering Corporation]] [[4.2FC fusion power core]].<ref name="EGWT" />

The turbolaser pulsor used an [[amplification dish]] around the [[turbolaser actuator]] to focus its energy beam, which had a range stretching from ten to thirty kilometers and could blast through nearly twenty meters of [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]]. The pulsor's output matched the power of a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] turbolaser. However, the power demand meant that pulsor could fire only once every [[Standard minute/Legends|minute]]. The pulsor also produced a deafening roar when firing. To prevent critical meltdowns in combat, four rows of [[cooling chamber]]s fitted with [[cryogenic cylinder]]s surrounded the [[Power core/Legends|power core]], [[EMS-500|energy capacitors]] and the pulsor.<ref name="EGWT" />

The MAS-2xB was also defended against enemy vehicles by two twin-[[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Turret/Legends|turrets]] and a [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad heavy laser cannon]] mounted on the command cabin. It was protected by [[Armor/Legends|armor]] plating two meters thick and six [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]].<ref name="EGWT" />

==Operational history==
The MAS-2xB was was a descendent of older turbolaser-based weapons including the [[Speizoc Arms]] [[C-136]] "Grandfather Gun", and Loronar's [[Turbolaser System I]]. This mobile turbolaser-mounted vehicle was commissioned for use by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|military forces]]. A single unit also cost nearly one million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Thus, the New Republic only maintained a few thousand of these vehicles and deployed them only in strategic battles.<ref name="EGWT" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
